status: M36 T1 SHIPPED 2026-04-21 (commit 52ac886 — 'feat(m36-t1): M36 T1 — capability taxonomy enum + shared-types scaffold', ledger 491d862). packages/shared-types/src/capabilities.ts NEW (148 LOC): CapabilityCategory 6-literal union, CAPABILITY_CATEGORIES readonly array, CAPABILITY_CATEGORY_MAP 6-key record `as const satisfies Record<CapabilityCategory, readonly string[]>` with all 41 locked §5.1 strings in category-declaration order (engineering 10 / product 7 / design 5 / operations 7 / strategy 6 / support 6), Capability string-literal union derived from map via indexed-access type (single authoring surface — no dual-source drift), CAPABILITY_LIST flattened readonly array, isCapability(unknown) O(1) type guard backed by module-local Set. packages/shared-types/src/capabilities.test.ts NEW (162 LOC, 18 tests — 3 above the ~15 estimate): shape invariants (41-entry count, no duplicates, lowercase-snake_case regex), category invariants (6 categories in declaration order, per-category counts pinning §5.1 verbatim), map ↔ list bidirectional consistency (flatten equals list, no cross-category leakage), pinned literal spot-check (12 representative strings across all 6 categories), isCapability happy path (every CAPABILITY_LIST entry returns true) + rejection paths (unknown strings, mixed case, hyphens, abbreviations, whitespace, empty string, 10 non-string values), type-level narrowing proof. packages/shared-types/src/index.ts MODIFIED (+1 line: './capabilities.js' export). Verification: vitest 24/24 pass in shared-types (was 6/6); full-repo typecheck clean across 6 packages; biome 0 errors on 3 touched files. unitTests 1169 → 1187 (+18). Zero IPC / zero bus events / zero migrations / zero settings keys — additive-only per M36 non-goals §2. Head-of-queue advances to M36 T2 (role-schema parser extension: capabilities field validation with zero-capability hard-error, unknown-capability hard-error, duplicate dedup + warning, missing-field policy by pack source per §5.4).
